hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path" in *.env|*/bot_state.json|*/trades_history.json|*/bot_health.json) echo 'BLOCKED: protected file — edit manually if needed' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILE" in */core/*|*/risk/*|*/exchange/*|*/strategy/*) MODULE=$(basename "$FILE" .py); TEST="tests/test_${MODULE}.py"; [ -f "$TEST" ] && echo "Running $TEST..." && venv/bin/pytest "$TEST" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5;; esac
